title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 161.062 - Selection of officers of the board
text:
161.062.  Selection of officers of the board. — The board shall elect one of its members president and one vice president and may appoint any other officers it deems necessary.  The officers shall serve at the pleasure of the board.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 2-6) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 160.070)
